pages.legal_notice_detected_text: This slug matches one of the legal pages shown automatically in the footer (Legal Notice, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, Terms and Conditions). Once published, the footer will link to this page automatically.
pages.legal_pages_modal_html:
Your site footer automatically shows links to legal pages required by law.

By default these links point to auto-generated templates. When you publish a page using one of these slugs, the footer links here automatically:

  • Legal Notice: aviso-legal, legal
  • Privacy Policy: privacy, privacidad, politica-de-privacidad
  • Cookie Policy: cookie-policy, cookies, politica-de-cookies
  • Terms and Conditions: terms-and-conditions, terminos-y-condiciones, terms

No setup needed; publish the page and it will appear automatically.

security_settings_subtitle: Manage allowed external domains for your site's Content Security Policy
csp_info_text: Your site uses a Content Security Policy (CSP) to protect visitors from malicious content. If you embed external widgets, chatbots, analytics, or other third-party services, you may need to add their domains here so the browser allows them to load.
csp_connect_src_help: Domains your site can connect to via AJAX, WebSocket, or fetch. Required for chatbots, analytics, APIs, and real-time services.
csp_script_src_help: Domains from which external JavaScript can be loaded. Required for widgets, analytics libraries, and embedded tools.
csp_frame_src_help: Domains that can be loaded inside iframes. Required for embedded forms, video players, and third-party widgets.
csp_img_src_help: Additional domains from which images can be loaded. By default, all HTTPS images are allowed.
csp_preview_help: Live preview of the CSP additions that will be applied to your site.
csp_warning_text: Only add domains you trust. Each domain added to CSP can load content on your site. Never add domains you don't control. If unsure, contact support before making changes.
